mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u1.username as senderName, u2.username as receiverName, u1.avatar as senderAvatar, u2.avatar as receiverAvatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.user_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND deleted = 0

SELECT m.*, u1.username as senderName, u2.username as receiverName, u1.avatar as senderAvatar, u2.avatar as receiverAvatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.user_id WHERE m.deleted = 0 AND ((m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{targetUserId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{targetUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId})) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
